## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows existing style (stdlib-only, PEP 8, ~100 char lines)
- [ ] Updated `config.example.env` if a new setting was added
- [ ] Updated `docs/SCORING.md` if scoring logic changed
- [ ] Updated `README.md` if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] No real IPs or secrets in code/tests/examples
- [ ] One logical change per PR (split if multiple)
